title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, analyzing why it matters for the company to go public before OpenAI and assessing Claude's competitive position. The segment covers strategic and financial implications of the public offering.
